mapper.select: SELECT id, admin_id, action, target, CASE WHEN ip LIKE '%.%' THEN split_part(ip, '.', 1) || '.' || split_part(ip, '.', 2) || '.' || split_part(ip, '.', 3) || '.**' WHEN ip LIKE '%:%' THEN split_part(ip, ':', 1) || ':' || split_part(ip, ':', 2) || ':' || split_part(ip, ':', 3) || ':' || split_part(ip, ':', 4) || ':****' ELSE ip END AS ip, created_at FROM audit_logs ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO audit_logs (admin_id, action, target, ip) VALUES (#{adminId}, #{action}, #{target}, #{ip})
